columns.name: sql
columns.min_value: SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE unit = '3.5g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0
columns.max_value: WITH t AS (SELECT CASE WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm, sku_count FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily)) SELECT category_norm, SUM(sku_count) AS products FROM t GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY products DESC
distinct_values: SELECT AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE unit = '3.5g' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0

SELECT brand, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT brand, SUM(sku_count) AS product_count FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CASE WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT Category, AVG(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Price, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS avg_price FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Price IS NOT NULL AND Price <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT category_norm, AVG(price_n) AS avg_price FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND price_n > 0 GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_price DESC
SELECT category_norm, AVG(thc_num) AS avg_thc FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND thc_num IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY avg_thc DESC

SELECT Category, SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Revenue, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_revenue FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Revenue IS NOT NULL AND Revenue <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND company IS NOT NULL AND company <> '' GROUP BY company ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Flower' AND flag = 'added' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS added_count FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM rhize_orders WHERE DATE(date) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT customerName, category, priority, description, status FROM rhize_sales_actions WHERE status <> 'Done' ORDER BY priority ASC, createdAt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT customerName, SUM(subtotal) AS rev FROM rhize_orders WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND status = 'Completed' GROUP BY customerName ORDER BY rev DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT date, customerName, productName, qty, subtotal FROM rhize_orders WHERE status <> 'Completed' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT date, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE (lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower')) AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT date, SUM(revenue) AS rev FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT name, city, tier FROM rhize_stores WHERE isPartner = 1 ORDER BY name LIMIT 100
SELECT product_name, brand, company, category_norm FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'removed' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY brand LIMIT 500

SELECT product_name, brand, company, days_on_shelf FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' ORDER BY days_on_shelf ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT product_name, brand, company, days_on_shelf FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' ORDER BY days_on_shelf DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT product_name, brand, company, price_n FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Vape' AND price_n < 25 AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY price_n ASC LIMIT 500

SELECT product_name, brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name <> '' GROUP BY product_name, brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT Product_Name, Company_Name, Category, date FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date DESC, Product_Name LIMIT 500
SELECT Product_Name, Company_Name, Category, Flag, date FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Removed' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) ORDER BY Product_Name LIMIT 500
SELECT productName, current_qty FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE current_qty < 10 ORDER BY current_qty ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT productName, lotNumber, current_qty, remaining, updatedAt FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE productName LIKE '%Berry Fizz%' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT Product_Name, SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(`Today's_Quantity_Total`, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS qty FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) GROUP BY Product_Name ORDER BY qty DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT strain, AVG(thc) AS avg_thc, COUNT(*) AS n_lots FROM rhize_product_lots WHERE thc IS NOT NULL GROUP BY strain ORDER BY avg_thc DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT strain, lotNumber, expirationDate FROM rhize_product_lots WHERE expirationDate BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY expirationDate ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(`Today's_Quantity_Total`, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS total_qty FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main)
SELECT SUM(openBalance) AS open_total FROM rhize_orders WHERE status <> 'Completed'

WITH t AS (SELECT CASE WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm, sku_count FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily)) SELECT category_norm, SUM(sku_count) AS products FROM t GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY products DESC
top_values: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(`Today's_Quantity_Total`, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS total_qty FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main)
SELECT product_name, brand, company, price_n FROM chatbot_market WHERE category_norm = 'Vape' AND price_n < 25 AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY price_n ASC LIMIT 500
SELECT productName, current_qty FROM rhize_live_inventory WHERE current_qty < 10 ORDER BY current_qty ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT date, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE (lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower')) AND date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT Product_Name, Company_Name, Category, date FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE Flag = 'Added' AND date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date DESC, Product_Name LIMIT 500

SELECT product_name, brand, company, days_on_shelf FROM chatbot_market WHERE date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) AND days_on_shelf IS NOT NULL AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' ORDER BY days_on_shelf ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT Category, AVG(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Price, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS avg_price FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Price IS NOT NULL AND Price <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY avg_price DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT brand, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

WITH t AS (SELECT CASE WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm, sku_count FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily)) SELECT category_norm, SUM(sku_count) AS products FROM t GROUP BY category_norm ORDER BY products DESC

SELECT product_name, brand, company, category_norm FROM chatbot_market WHERE flag = 'removed' AND date_d = (SELECT MAX(date_d) FROM chatbot_market) ORDER BY brand LIMIT 500

SELECT Category, SUM(CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(Revenue, '[^0-9.]', '') AS DECIMAL(12,2))) AS total_revenue FROM rhize_dataset_main WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM rhize_dataset_main) AND Revenue IS NOT NULL AND Revenue <> '' GROUP BY Category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT CASE WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%flower%' OR lower(category) IN ('pre-packed flowers','pre-packed-flower') THEN 'Flower' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%pre%roll%' OR lower(category) IN ('preroll','prerolls') THEN 'PreRoll' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%vape%' OR lower(category) IN ('cartridge','carts','vapecarts','vape-carts','vape pens') THEN 'Vape' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%concentrate%' THEN 'Concentrate' WHEN lower(category) LIKE '%edible%' THEN 'Edible' ELSE 'Other' END AS category_norm, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

columns.name: refusal
columns.min_value: I can only access your licensed state(s). I can't query other states.
columns.max_value: I'm read-only and can't delete or change any data. I can show you market data with a SELECT instead.

sample_rows.question: Top brands in the market.
sample_rows.sql: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

sample_rows.question: Who is my competitor?
sample_rows.sql: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

sample_rows.question: Who are my competitors?
sample_rows.sql: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

sample_rows.question: Show me my top competitors.
sample_rows.sql: SELECT brand, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND brand IS NOT NULL AND brand <> '' GROUP BY brand ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

sample_rows.question: Top 5 competing stores by revenue.
sample_rows.sql: SELECT company, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM chatbot_mv_market_daily) AND company IS NOT NULL AND company <> '' GROUP BY company ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5
